_comment: Hand-curated 'recommended next work' shown on the system-map card. Treat as a short rolling backlog.

items.title: Wire dashboard send-morning-ping-dm to OpenClaw MCP
items.rationale: Action stub exists; needs to actually call mcp__openclaw__messages_send via the local gateway's HTTP API. Current workaround: ask Claude to send.

items.title: Telegram command bridge
items.rationale: Dashboard's HTTP action API is registry-driven and ready. Add a Telegram message handler that maps '/news doctor', '/organizer tick', etc. to POST /api/system/<alias>/action/<name>.

items.title: Computer manual-review approval helper
items.rationale: Dashboard could surface the 39 manualReview items with per-row check + a single 'approve selected' button calling computer.approve --kinds-include with explicit IDs.

items.title: Photos Picker API exploration
items.rationale: Investigate Google Photos Picker API as the only path to broad library scan post-2025 deprecation. Bigger work; keep on backlog until you actually want library reads.
